words.exampleBs: Arapska hrana je bogata raznovrsnim okusima.
words.exampleEn: Arabic food is rich in diverse flavours.

words.exampleBs: Voli kuhati i isprobavati nove recepte.
words.exampleEn: She loves cooking and tries new recipes.

words.exampleArabic: ذَهَبْنَا إِلَى مَطْعَمٍ شَرْقِيٍّ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Otišli smo u istočnjački restoran u centru grada.
words.exampleEn: We went to an Eastern restaurant in the city centre.

words.exampleArabic: يَأْكُلُ الْعَرَبُ الْخُبْزَ مَعَ مُعْظَمِ الْوَجَبَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Arapi jedu hljeb uz većinu obroka.
words.exampleEn: Arabs eat bread with most meals.

words.exampleBs: Riža je kuhana sa šafranom i maslacem.
words.exampleEn: The rice was cooked with saffron and butter.

words.exampleArabic: يُفَضِّلُ لَحْمَ الضَّأْنِ الْمَشْوِيَّ عَلَى غَيْرِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Preferira pečeno jagnjeće meso nad ostalim.
words.exampleEn: He prefers grilled lamb meat over others.

words.exampleBs: Skuhala je piletinu s češnjakom i limunovim sokom.
words.exampleEn: She cooked the chicken with garlic and lemon juice.

words.exampleBs: Jede ribu dva puta sedmično.
words.exampleEn: He eats fish twice a week.

words.exampleBs: Kupila je svježe povrće s tržnice.
words.exampleEn: She bought fresh vegetables from the market.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَوِي الطَّبَقُ عَلَى فَاكِهَةٍ طَازَجَةٍ مُتَنَوِّعَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Na tanjiru se nalazi raznovrsno svježe voće.
words.exampleEn: The plate contains a variety of fresh fruit.

words.exampleBs: Arapska kuhinja je poznata po svojim bogatim začinima.
words.exampleEn: Arabic cuisine is famous for its rich spices.

words.exampleBs: Masline se obično poslužuju uz doručak.
words.exampleEn: Olives are usually served with breakfast.

words.exampleBs: Maslinovo ulje se dodaje u salatu.
words.exampleEn: Olive oil is added to the salad.

words.exampleArabic: الثُّومُ مَكُونٌ أَسَاسِيٌّ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ الْأَطْبَاقِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Češnjak je osnovna namirnica u mnogim arapskim jelima.
words.exampleEn: Garlic is a key ingredient in many Arabic dishes.

words.exampleBs: Isjeckala je luk i dodala ga u tajin.
words.exampleEn: She chopped the onion and added it to the tagine.

words.exampleBs: Svježi paradajz je osnova za pravljenje sosa.
words.exampleEn: Fresh tomatoes are the base for making sauce.

words.exampleBs: Pije čaj s mentom nakon jela.
words.exampleEn: He drinks mint tea after eating.

words.exampleBs: Arapska kafa se poslužuje s kardamomom i šafranom.
words.exampleEn: Arabic coffee is served with cardamom and saffron.

words.exampleBs: Popila je svježi sok od nara.
words.exampleEn: She drank fresh pomegranate juice.

words.exampleArabic: اشْرَبْ كَمِيَّةً كَافِيَةً مِنَ الْمَاءِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
words.exampleBs: Pij dovoljnu količinu vode svaki dan.
words.exampleEn: Drink a sufficient amount of water every day.

words.exampleArabic: الْوَجْبَةُ الرَّئِيسِيَّةُ عِنْدَ الْعَرَبِ هِيَ الْغَدَاءُ.
words.exampleBs: Glavni obrok kod Arapa je ručak.
words.exampleEn: The main meal for Arabs is lunch.

words.exampleArabic: الْفُطُورُ الْعَرَبِيُّ يَشْمَلُ الْجُبْنَةَ وَالزَّيْتُونَ وَالْبَيْضَ.
words.exampleBs: Arapski doručak uključuje sir, masline i jaja.
words.exampleEn: Arabic breakfast includes cheese, olives, and eggs.

words.exampleArabic: يَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَةُ عَلَى الْغَدَاءِ كُلَّ جُمُعَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica se svake subote okupe na ručku.
words.exampleEn: The family gathers for lunch every Friday.

words.exampleBs: Večerali su u kućnoj bašti.
words.exampleEn: They had dinner in the home garden.

words.exampleArabic: ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى السُّوقِ لِشِرَاءِ الْخُضَرِ وَالْفَاكِهَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Otišla je na tržnicu da kupi povrće i voće.
words.exampleEn: She went to the market to buy vegetables and fruit.

words.exampleArabic: الْمَطْبَخُ الْعَرَبِيُّ مَشْهُورٌ فِي الْعَالَمِ كُلِّهِ.
words.exampleBs: Arapska kuhinja je poznata u cijelom svijetu.
words.exampleEn: Arabic cuisine is famous throughout the world.

words.exampleBs: Baka mi je dala tradicionalni recept za mansaf.
words.exampleEn: My grandmother gave me the traditional mansaf recipe.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْرِصُ عَلَى شِرَاءِ اللَّحْمِ الْحَلَالِ فَقَطْ.
words.exampleBs: Brine se da kupuje samo halal meso.
words.exampleEn: He makes sure to buy only halal meat.

words.exampleArabic: طَعْمُ الْكُبَّةِ لَا يُوصَفُ مِنْ رَوْعَتِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Okus kubbe ne može se opisati koliko je prefinjen.
words.exampleEn: The taste of kibbeh is indescribably wonderful.

words.exampleBs: Sastojci su jednostavni, ali rezultat je odličan.
words.exampleEn: The ingredients are simple but the result is wonderful.

words.exampleBs: Skuhao je ukusno jelo za svoje goste.
words.exampleEn: He cooked a delicious meal for his guests.

words.exampleArabic: شَوَى اللَّحْمَ عَلَى الْفَحْمِ مُدَّةَ سَاعَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Pekao je meso na ugljenu sat vremena.
words.exampleEn: He grilled the meat on charcoal for one hour.

words.exampleBs: Pržila je jaja i povrće na ulju.
words.exampleEn: She fried the eggs and vegetables in oil.

words.exampleBs: Pekla je hljeb u glinenoj peći.
words.exampleEn: She baked the bread in the clay oven.

words.exampleBs: Dodao je sol i biber u jelo.
words.exampleEn: He added salt and pepper to the dish.

words.exampleBs: Kuharica je probala juhu prije posluživanja.
words.exampleEn: The cook tasted the soup before serving it.

words.exampleBs: Izrezao je povrće na male komade.
words.exampleEn: He chopped the vegetables into small pieces.

words.exampleBs: Porodica je zajedno večerala.
words.exampleEn: The family had dinner together.

words.exampleBs: Humus koji je napravila je veoma ukusan.
words.exampleEn: The hummus she made is very delicious.

words.exampleArabic: هَذَا الطَّبَقُ حَارٌّ جِدًّا بِسَبَبِ الْفِلْفَلِ الْأَحْمَرِ.
words.exampleBs: Ovo jelo je veoma ljuto zbog crvene paprike.
words.exampleEn: This dish is very spicy because of the red pepper.

words.exampleBs: Svježe povrće je bolje od zamrznutog.
words.exampleEn: Fresh vegetables are better than frozen ones.

words.exampleBs: Hurma je slatka i korisna za zdravlje.
words.exampleEn: Dates are sweet and beneficial for health.

words.exampleBs: Čorba je malo slana, pa je dodao vodu.
words.exampleEn: The soup is a little salty, so he added water.

words.exampleArabic: الْحُمُّصُ طَبَقٌ شَعْبِيٌّ مَشْهُورٌ فِي بِلَادِ الشَّامِ.
words.exampleBs: Humus je poznato narodno jelo u levantskim zemljama.
words.exampleEn: Hummus is a well-known popular dish in the Levant region.

words.exampleArabic: يُقَدَّمُ التَّمْرُ مَعَ الْقَهْوَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ عِنْدَ الضِّيَافَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Hurma se poslužuje uz arapsku kafu pri ugošćavanju.
words.exampleEn: Dates are served with Arabic coffee when hosting guests.
